selected_dialects.reason: Hub body is a rotationally symmetric solid: outer dia 300, inner bore 40, height 35. Revolve_profile to create the hub, cut_center_bore for the 40 mm bore.
6 equally spaced blades (thickness 5, height 20) placed on the hub outer surface require circular_pattern_component (count 6) and boolean_union to combine blade solids with the hub.

selected_domain_skills.reason: Centrifugal impeller domain: hub + radial blades layout pattern.

unsupported_capabilities: Blade aerodynamic profiling (airfoil curvature, inlet/outlet angles, splitter blades)
Structural integrity or fatigue life prediction
safety_notes: Generative CAD output is reference geometry only. Not validated for manufacturing, structural analysis, or aerodynamic performance.
No certification or airworthiness claim is implied.

Blade geometry via axisymmetric+composition is simplified (straight radial blades of uniform thickness); real impeller blades typically require lofted 3D profiles not expressible in these dialects alone.
